actions.value:
Hi {{ticket.requester.first_name}},

Thank you for working with us to get this issue resolved.
We have another update that should now fully restore the app's ability to read your Thorchain balances.

Would you please try once more to download this latest build and let us know if you can then see your staked balances again?

https://drive.google.com/file/d/16FTSr2v7JSASxnMXyg-4BgXpQsEXqxUB/view?usp=sharing

 

We're looking forward to your response.
